channel.title: SPL - Columbia Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Columbia Branch

item.title: Kaleidoscope Play & Learn / Caleidoscopio Juega y Aprende
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Columbia Branch

Children listen to multilingual stories, sing songs and do simple crafts with their caregivers during the group time.Event is in English and Spanish. ---------------------------------------Los niños escuchan cuentos multilingües, cantan canciones y hacen manualidades sencillas con sus cuidadores durante el tiempo en grupo.Evento en inglés y español.

Event details

item.title: Arts & Movement with Rec'n the Streets
item.description:
Saturday, April 11, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Columbia Branch

Join us for art and movement activities every week. Get creative and move your body!April's Arts & Movements events will be held outside!

Event details

item.title: Workshop for End-of-Life Planning: The Secrets of Dying Well
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Columbia Branch

Join us for a presentation on the secrets to dying well.

Event details

item.title: Arts & Movement with Rec'n the Streets
item.description:

Location: Columbia Branch

Join us for art and movement activities every week. Get creative and move your body!April's Arts & Movements events will be held outside!
